title: Gardens & Groves
description: A vanilla-plus modpack perfect for a survival-multiplayer experience! Travel to various dimensions or explore the new additions to the overworld, all while using many hand-picked optimizations for the best user experience.
body: The Garden & Groves modpack is an outstanding choice for anyone who wants a survival multiplayer pack that provides a great vanilla plus experience. The Gardens & Groves modpack is perfect for enhancing the overall performance of the game, while also coming with many resource packs and shader packs to give the game a "fresh" new look. Gardens & Groves features many mods that add various new dimensions, such as the Aether and the BumbleZone, and even features various planets through the Stellaris mod. Gardens & Groves also enhances the overworld, featuring beautiful cascades and waterfalls and wonderful echoes of monsters in caves. Gardens & Groves is simply a great choice for anyone looking for a fresh take on a vanilla plus experience.
